title: SpaceX set to launch Starship test flight on May 20: Here’s all you need to know
summary: SpaceX will launch its 12th Starship test flight on 20 May 2026, from Texas. The mission will test upgraded V3 systems, including engines, stage separation and heat shield performance. It is a key step toward NASA’s Artemis Moon programme and future Mars exploration plans.

title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 crosses one billion AI visuals in India: 10 most popular prompts users are trying
summary: India has become one of the largest markets for ChatGPT Images 2.0, with users generating over 1 billion AI-generated visuals. From anime avatars and cinematic portraits to retro Bollywood posters and AI fashion editorials, creators are rapidly embracing AI-generated imagery across platforms.

title: Is your iPhone ready for iOS 27? The biggest AI features expected at WWDC 2026 and rumored compatible devices
summary: Apple is all set to introduce iOS 27 at WWDC. The new UI is expected to bring a revamped Siri, AI-powered tools in the Photos app and a new extensions system inside Play Store.&nbsp;

title: From Aluminium OS to Gemini Omni: The biggest AI upgrades expected at Google I/O 2026
summary: Google I/O will kick off from Tuesday with a keynote address by Sundar Pichai. The company is expected to showcase major AI upgrades including Gemini 4.0 and Gemini Spark and a new Omni video model.&nbsp;

title: Forza Horizon 6 release time: When can you play on Xbox, PC, and Steam in India?
summary: Forza Horizon 6 is all set to be released on 19th May. The game can be pre-downloaded right now with download sizes being 135 GB for Xbox Series X, 130 GB for Series S, and 160 GB for PC.

title: Is your iPhone battery draining after iOS 26.5 update? Here’s why you don't need to panic just yet
summary: iOS 26.5 users are reporting significant battery drain and overheating issues after the update. Several users on social media are raising concerns that the new update is causing their Apple iPhones to heat up.

title: Two years after announcement, Apple’s new Siri to still launch in ‘beta’ with fresh privacy features: Report
summary: The upcoming iOS 27 is expected to introduce a revamped Siri but with the ‘beta’ lable. Apple is also said to be focusing on adding privacy controls to the Siri chatbot like auto-deleting chat history and limited memory retention.

title: Wealthtech platform Trackk raises $3.7 million led by Lightspeed Ventures
summary: Trackk, a stock trading platform for Gen Z investors, has secured $3.7 million in a funding round. Lightspeed Ventures led the investment. The platform uses AI for stock discovery and simplified trading. Trackk aims to expand its product offerings and marketing efforts with this capital.

title: Unacademy’s test prep CEO Sumit Jain quits ahead of upGrad acquisition
summary: Sumit Jain has stepped down from his role in Unacademy, ahead of a potential merger with upGrad Education. Jain, who joined Unacademy in 2020, will continue as an advisor. His departure follows the companies filing for merger approval with the Competition Commission of India.

title: Moglix appoints Amit Kumar as MD and chief business officer
summary: Moglix, a B2B industrial commerce platform, has appointed Amit Kumar as its managing director and chief business officer. summary: OpenAI has won its legal battle with Elon Musk. This victory paves the way for a massive stock market debut. summary: Samsung Electronics and its labor union are in crucial government-led talks. The aim is to resolve a dispute over pay and bonuses. title: Analog Devices in talks to buy Empower Semiconductor for $1.5 billion: Bloomberg News
summary: US chipmaker Analog Devices is nearing a deal to buy AI chip firm Empower Semiconductor. The acquisition is reportedly valued at around $1.5 billion. Empower Semiconductor makes power management chips for AI processors and data centres. This move comes amid strong investment in data centre infrastru

title: How US President Donald Trump's crypto venture and Iran's top exchange tapped into the same industry networks
summary: Iran's Nobitex exchange moved billions through Tron and BNB Chain, networks by Justin Sun and Changpeng Zhao. These blockchains facilitated transactions for sanctioned Iranian entities. Meanwhile, Sun and Binance, Zhao's exchange, backed Donald Trump's crypto firm. This highlights potential conflict

title: China market for Nvidia AI chips to open 'over time': CEO Jensen Huang
summary: Nvidia boss Jensen Huang expects China to eventually open its market to high-end US chips that can train and run artificial intelligence systems. "My sense is that over time the market will open," added Huang, CEO of Nvidia - the world's most valuable company, due to huge demand for its AI hardware.

title: Key moments in the Musk vs OpenAI trial
summary: A jury ruled Elon Musk waited too long to sue OpenAI, rejecting his claims that CEOs Sam Altman and Greg Brockman broke their nonprofit agreement. Musk sought $150 billion in damages and the removal of the executives, but the jury sided with OpenAI, ending the three-week trial.
